## Body
Cyber Monday Extended: Save 70% on MonsterInsights! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..NR99FCLoia3lsdzTUIY8I9f4wlOYJE9gzGwOTDPFQz0 )

Hey Muhammad,

This is your absolute last chance to save on a new or upgraded
MonsterInsights subscription during our once-a-year event.

👉 Last chance to get 70% off MonsterInsights 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..NR99FCLoia3lsdzTUIY8I9f4wlOYJE9gzGwOTDPFQz0 )
 👈

Don’t let it pass you by 👋

Cyber Monday pricing ends tonight at 11:59pm EST.

Save 70% Now 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..NR99FCLoia3lsdzTUIY8I9f4wlOYJE9gzGwOTDPFQz0 )

When you purchase MonsterInsights Pro this Cyber Monday, we’re
also giving you a whole year of UserFeedback Plus for free! Find
out the why behind your visitors' actions with simple yet
powerful user surveys.

Until next time,
Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator

*Discount applies to new purchases and upgrades only.
